_chip: Graphcore IPU GC200 / Bow IPU (Hot Chips 2020/2022)
_reference: Jia et al., Dissecting the Graphcore IPU Architecture via Microbenchmarking
_notes: 7nm TSMC, 1472 independent tiles, each ~6 threads, 624KB SRAM/tile = 897MB total, 1.35GHz (Bow), all-SRAM no external DRAM, BSP execution model, 250 TFLOPS FP16

dram._comment: Graphcore IPU has no external DRAM; configured with minimal DRAM for compatibility
